name: C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd.
summary: C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells spring loaded probes and connectors in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers testing solutions, including high frequency testing, Kelvin contact testing, memory testing, burn-in testing, fine pitch connector testing, IC and ICT test probe, ATE connecting, general final testing, panel testing, wafer level testing, battery probe, and high current IC testing solutions. It also provides pogo pin connectors, such as standard and non-standard, single pogo pin, waterproof, ball point, magnetic, high current and frequency, and ultra-small pin connectors, as well as screw pins; female and industrial connectors; and DAC network cables. The company was formerly known as CCP Contact Probes Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd. in 1998. C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
